releases.label: ShapePipe shear catalogue
releases.summary: First weak-lensing analysis of UNIONS/CFIS r-band data spanning 1,700 deg2: a catalogue with measured shapes for 40 million galaxies (effective density 6.8 per arcmin2), produced with the ShapePipe pipeline (Guinot et al. 2022). Basis for cosmological studies toward the completed 4,800 deg2 UNIONS lensing survey. No public archive download location is stated in the paper; access is via the UNIONS consortium.

releases.label: Survey overview (Gwyn et al. 2025)
releases.summary: UNIONS survey overview (AJ 170, 324): ugriz imaging of a core region of 6,250 deg2 of the northern sky with CFHT MegaCam (u, r), Subaru HSC (g, z) and Pan-STARRS (i, z), to 10-sigma point-source depths of u=23.7, g=24.5, r=24.2, i=23.8, z=23.3 (AB, 2 arcsec aperture). Per-band coverage as of January 2025: u 8,327, g 5,755, r 5,638, i 7,717, z_PS 3,988, z_HSC 3,514 deg2 (including extra-footprint area). No formally labelled public data release exists yet — the 'Data Releases 1-4' in the paper are internal Pan-STARRS stack sets; sky coverage is browsable at CADC. Survey ongoing with extensions from 2025.
